message:
fix(graph): report all SCC members in cycle detection, not minimal path

The find_cycles() DFS was finding a minimal cycle path within each SCC,
which could miss SCC members not on that specific path. For example, a
6-node SCC might only report 4 nodes. Now reports all SCC members
sorted by ID, matching Go's behavior. Fixes the conformance test
stress_insights_detects_both_cycle_components (expected 9 members, got 7).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
